seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Design loops that prompt agents instead of manual prompting; use automations for autonomous discovery/triage, worktrees for isolated features, skills for project-specific knowledge, plugins/connectors for tools, and sub-agents for ideation/verification, all tracked via simple markdown/linear state.
A single heartbeat automation in Codex can handle state tracking, spin up projects/threads, and enable full agentic workflows with sub-agents and skills.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Potential biggest week in AI with multiple labs announcing models including Gemini 3.5 Pro alongside others.
near_misses.reason: High-level announcement teaser without specific technical details or implementations.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Separate skills from tools, use dynamic prompt assembly and modular integration to avoid monolithic agents and technical debt.
near_misses.reason: Conceptual advice on agent architecture but low engagement and no new repo/framework shared.
